title: General office - customer facing
description: General office areas and customer facing areas.

title: General office - non customer facing
description: General office areas and non-customer facing areas.

title: Warehouses
description: Large storage facility with limited office space and low density occupation by supplier personnel.

title: Restaurant and catering facilities
description: Areas including restaurants, deli-bars, coffee lounges and areas used exclusively for consuming food and beverages.

title: Pre-school
description: Pre-school, including crèche, nursery and after-school facilities.

title: Primary school
description: Primary school facilities.

title: Secondary school
description: Secondary school facilities.

title: Special schools
description: Special school facilities.

title: Universities and colleges
description: University and college, including on and off site campus facilities but excluding student residential accommodation facilities.

title: Doctors, dentists and health clinics
description: Community led facilities including doctors, dentists and health clinics.

title: Nursery and care homes
description: Nursery and care home facilities.

title: External parks, grounds and car parks
description: External car parks and grounds including externally fixed assets. For example: fences, gates, fountains.

title: Laboratory
description: Includes all Government facilities where the standard of cleanliness is high, access is restricted and is not public facing.

title: Heritage buildings
description: Buildings of historical or cultural significance.

title: Nuclear facilities
description: Areas associated with nuclear activities.

title: Animal facilities
description: Areas associated with the housing of animals such as dog kennels and stables.

title: Custodial facilities
description: Facilities relating to the detention of personnel such as prisons and detention centres.

title: Fire and police stations
description: Areas associated with emergency services.

title: Production facilities
description: An environment centered around a fabrication or production facility, typically with restricted access.

title: Workshops
description: Areas where works are undertaken such as joinery or metal working facilities.

title: Garages
description: Areas where motor vehicles are cleaned, serviced, repaired and maintained.

title: Shopping centres
description: Areas where retail services are delivered to the public.

title: Museums or galleries
description: Areas that are generally open to the public with some restrictions in place from time to time. Some facilities have no public access.

title: Fitness or training establishments
description: Areas associated with fitness and leisure such as swimming pools, gymnasia, fitness centres and internal or external sports facilities.

title: Residential buildings
description: Residential accommodation or areas.

title: Port and airport buildings
description: Areas associated with air and sea transportation and supporting facilities. For example: airports, aerodromes and dock areas.

title: List x property
description: A commercial site (that is non-government) on UK soil that is approved to hold UK government protectively marked information marked as ''confidential'' and above. It is applied to a company''s specific site and not a company as a whole.

title: Hospitals
description: Areas including mainstream medical, healthcare facilities such as hospitals and medical centres.

title: Mothballed or vacant or disposal
description: Areas which are vacant or awaiting disposal where no services are being undertaken.
